# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy-dev
  - deploy-test
  - deploy-prod

variables:
  BUILD_NUMBER: $CI_BUILD_NUMBER

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - mkdir output
    - cp binaries/* output/
    - cp configs/* output/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - output
    expire_in: 30 days

deploy-dev:
  stage: deploy-dev
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - curl -o output.tar.gz http://ci-server/artifacts/$BUILD_NUMBER/output.tar.gz
    - tar xvf output.tar.gz
    - cp dev/configs/* configs/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $CI_PROJECT_DIR/configs/

deploy-test:
  stage: deploy-test
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - curl -o output.tar.gz http://ci-server/artifacts/$BUILD_NUMBER/output.tar.gz
    - tar xvf output.tar.gz
    - cp test/configs/* configs/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $CI_PROJECT_DIR/configs/

deploy-prod:
  stage: deploy-prod
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - curl -o output.tar.gz http://ci-server/artifacts/$BUILD_NUMBER/output.tar.gz
    - tar xvf output.tar.gz
    - cp prod/configs/* configs/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $CI_PROJECT_DIR/configs/
